commitMessage:
Merge pull request #1306 from wxh06/develop

Set jsDelivr to default GFWListURL instead of GitHub Raw

body.content:
switch event {
            case .next(let value):
                self.parent.forwardOn(.next(value))
            case .error(let error):
                self.parent.forwardOn(.error(error))
                self.parent.dispose()
            case .completed:
                self.parent.group.remove(for: self.disposeKey)
                self.parent.activeCount -= 1
                self.parent.checkCompleted()
            }
